Test Description: Verify a user can successfully register with valid details.
Verify registration fails when required fields are missing.
Expected Result: Error message shown for missing fields

Test Description: Verify registration fails when attempting to use an already registered email.
Expected Result: Error message shown for duplicate email

Test Description: Verify login succeeds with valid, correct credentials.
Expected Result: User logged in and redirected to dashboard

Test Description: Verify login fails and shows an error with an incorrect password.
Expected Result: Error message shown for invalid password

Test Description: Verify login fails for an email that does not exist in the system.
Expected Result: Error message shown for unregistered email

Test Description: Verify clicking logout destroys the session and redirects the user safely.
Expected Result: Session destroyed, user on login page

Test Description: Verify attempting to access dashboard.php without an active session redirects to login.php.
Verify strict password creation constraints are enforced during registration.
Expected Result: Validation error if constraints not met

Test Description: Verify prolonged inactivity results in an automatic logout.
Verify a Student role can access the student dashboard view.
Verify an Instructor role uniquely accesses the instructor dashboard and analytics.
Verify a Student gets an Access Denied error if trying to load course_analytics.php.
Verify system correctly sets the Role state variable during the authentication phase.
Verify instructors cannot access analytics or course data belonging to courses they are not assigned to.
Verify a user cannot access another user's private message context.
Verify an instructor can successfully view a roster of students enrolled in their courses.
Verify students are strictly prevented from viewing the global student roster.
Verify an instructor has authorization to edit their course settings.
Verify a student cannot edit course settings.
Verify dashboard.php loads correctly without missing resources upon login.
Verify the dashboard displays the correct user's name in the greeting.
Verify all sidebar/header links route to the correct respective pages.
Verify a student's dashboard dynamically lists only the courses they are actively enrolled in.
Verify an instructor's dashboard lists only the courses they instruct.
Verify quantitative dashboard statistics (e.g., active courses, unread messages) are accurate.
Verify recent activity feed loads appropriately without database errors.
Verify empty data states (e.g., No active courses) are handled gracefully without breaking the layout.
Verify clicking a specific course tile navigates to the detailed view of that course.
Verify interactive buttons on the dashboard trigger the intended functional workflow.
Verify course_analytics.php properly loads and initializes for authorized users.
Verify analytics correctly aggregate overall student completion percentages.
Verify the UI displays accurately computed average assessment scores for the class.
Verify students with absolutely zero activity are omitted from the class average penalty calculation.
Verify graphic visualization (progress bars/charts) renders successfully based on valid data variables.
Verify if a course has no data, a proper No Data Available message is displayed.
Verify the ability to filter analytics data individually by course works as intended.
Verify loading large aggregated datasets via analytics does not drastically stall the page.
Verify data grids/tables in analytics appropriately paginate if the volume of students is exceptionally high.
Verify any export features (CSV/PDF) correctly download matching table datasets.
Expected Result: File exports successfully with correct data

Test Description: Verify messages.php layout loads correctly.
Verify a user can successfully draft and send a message to another valid user.
Verify incoming messages properly populate the recipient's inbox queue.
Verify the unread message indicator increments upon receiving a fresh message.
Expected Result: Unread counter accurately reflects new messages

Test Description: Verify clicking to view a message triggers a state update marking it as Read.
Expected Result: Message marked as read when opened

Test Description: Verify users can seamlessly reply directly within a message thread UI.
Verify attempting to fire an empty message payload results in a targeted validation warning.
Verify users are restricted from sending messages to themselves.
Verify searching or basic inbox filtering operates correctly.
Verify a user can delete a message to hide it from their view.
Verify navigating from the course view into the forum functions properly.
Verify users are able to originate a new topic in a forum board.
Verify users are able to reply to existing forum discussion threads.
Verify instructors maintain deletion powers over inappropriate posts.
Verify students can only manage their own posts—not the posts of their peers.
Verify syllabus and module structures correctly populate course_data.php inclusion mechanisms.
Verify students can mark standard modules as complete.
Verify handing in graded materials safely communicates insertion to the database.
Verify the CSS (assets/app.css) reflows major components properly on a simulated mobile viewpoint.
Verify layout configurations and Javascript event listeners generally succeed across modern standard web browsers.
